name: get-qclaw-api-key
description: CLI tool to extract apiKey from a logged-in local QClaw installation

scripts.build:win: npm run bundle && pkg dist/get-key.cjs --targets node18-win-x64 --output dist/get-qclaw-key.exe && pkg dist/models.cjs --targets node18-win-x64 --output dist/get-qclaw-models.exe && pkg dist/balance.cjs --targets node18-win-x64 --output dist/get-qclaw-balance.exe
